headline: U.S. food sector faces uncertain growth despite attractive valuations
summary: Investing.com -- The U.S. food industry is grappling with a complex mix of economic pressures and shifting consumer behavior, raising concerns about its near-term growth prospects, according to a new industry report by BTIG.
